name: Bmob
description: Chinese BaaS offering cloud DB, file storage, push and server-less cloud functions for mobile/WeChat apps.

seo.title: Bmob — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Bmob: Chinese BaaS offering cloud DB, file storage, push and server-less cloud functions for mobile/WeChat apps.

when_to_use: BaaS backend for WeChat Mini Program app development
Cloud DB, push and storage for Chinese mobile applications
Serverless functions for lightweight Chinese app backends
Rapid prototype backend for students and indie developers
Push notifications to iOS/Android from Chinese data centers

pros: Cheap BaaS inside the Chinese market
cons: Docs and support mostly in Chinese
review.verdict: A reasonable BaaS if you ship exclusively to WeChat and Chinese mobile apps, otherwise skip.
review.best_for: Chinese mobile and WeChat mini-program developers on a budget
review.not_for: Global apps needing English docs and multi-region hosting

lock_in.reason: Chinese BaaS, data tied to platform
